Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 97 

GENE_THRPY_DRUGS_TOT_AMT 

LABEL: Gene Therapy Drugs Total Charge Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This field contains the total charge amount for gene therapy drugs. 

SHORT NAME: GENE_THRPY_DRUGS_TOT_AMT 

LONG NAME: GENE_THRPY_DRUGS_TOT_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 10 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center total charge amount associated with revenue
